text: - **`theme.rs`** — one accent (cyan, ANSI-256 `45`), success/error/muted, chosen to hold contrast on both light and dark backgrounds [...] | Accent (prompt ?, pointer, answers) | 45 #00d7ff | 31 #0087af | [...] Theme selection: OSC 11 background query (terminal-light crate), fallback to dark palette (its colors were chosen to stay ≥3:1 on white too), TENEX_EDGE_THEME override, NO_COLOR honored. Cyan accent matches the existing ratatui picker. No emoji; ASCII degrade (>, ok:, error:, -\|/) when locale isn't UTF-8. [...] For the user: the design agent's report matches what I already pulled from the spec file and incorporated (palette, merged provider list+actions, error recovery, confirm pattern). Still not implemented: OSC-11 theme auto-detection and the `was: <old value>` diff line on the confirm screen. Want me to add either of those now, or leave the current build as-is?
